reviews.comment:
El servicio del kiosco deja mucho para desear, mala onda y muy lento. El playero fue un genio. Había mucha fila para cargar el combustible. Deben tener una fila aparte para los socios de ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the kiosk leaves much to be desired: unfriendly and very slow. The valet attendant was a genius. There were long lines to fill up with gas. They should have a separate line for ACA members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwcmRfQ2RBEAE
